note: ПДР 9.3: left turn by hand = left arm straight to side OR right arm bent up. Our option 2 'Витягнете ліву руку у вікно в бік' (left arm straight to side) is correct. Confirmed by official 9.3 text (vodiy.ua, green-way.com.ua) and mirror right-turn question (testpdr.online q255) which marks left-arm-bent-up as the RIGHT-turn signal, so our option 3 is a distractor and option 1 (right arm straight) signals a right turn.
